description: ISO 27001:2022 intra-control dependency relationships derived from ISO 27002:2022 implementation guidance
methodology: Compiled from ISO 27002:2022 cross-references, operational capability groupings, and practitioner implementation ordering consensus (ISMS.online, HighTable, Aviso Consultancy, Secureframe, DataGuard)

relationship_types.depends-on: Hard requirement — this control cannot function without the target control being in place
relationship_types.enables: Provides capability — this control provides a capability that the target control consumes
relationship_types.feeds-into: Data flow — output of this control is input to the target control
relationship_types.supports: Reinforcement — this control reinforces or supplements the target control
relationship_types.implements: Technical realisation — this control is the technical implementation of the target policy control
